## Supervisor guidance for critique

Reject ambiguity with retry/exploration/sycophancy; require N and delta; enforce >=2 seeds per sub-mode.

Run-level focus: redundant_tool_invocation - agent calls tools that duplicate prior calls, re-fetch known facts, or chain unnecessary verifications when one call suffices.
